metadata.guardrail: AI copy is generated from validated metrics and does not modify numeric source data.

hero.headline: Closed-won sales are behind goal by $250,000
hero.body: The latest CRM refresh shows $1,750,000 in closed-won sales against the $2,000,000 goal — 88% of target, a $250,000 gap to close. $5,760,000 of pipeline is still open and working to close it.

cards.title: Goal status
cards.body: Closed-won revenue missed the $2,000,000 target by $250,000, landing at 88% attainment.

cards.title: What's driving it
cards.body: The biggest win on the board so far is Pinnacle BioSystems at $1,240,000, booked by Jordan Miles in the West region. It is not yet enough to clear the target.

cards.title: Pipeline coverage
cards.body: $5,760,000 of pipeline is still open. Weighted by win probability, the full book forecasts to $5,241,300. Jordan Miles is carrying the most at $3,830,000.

cards.title: Needs attention
cards.body: 2 open opportunities have gone untouched for 21+ days and stay flagged for follow-up. Closest to landing: 3 deals worth $2,300,000 sitting in Negotiation.
